SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.simulation

Class AIAdvisor

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.simulation.AIAdvisor
public class AIAdvisor extends Object
AI Advisor — connects to Groq API and returns DecisionOption arrays: 1. Dangerous event — 3 DecisionOptions with cost 2. Monthly report — DecisionOptions per ministry (ADD/CUT/KEEP) 3. Annual review — 1 DecisionOption (KEEP/FIRE)
